desc: Creates a new Revision in the active document with description, date, issued-by / issued-to fields, and an optional issued flag.
summary: Creates a new Revision in the active document with description, date, issued-by / issued-to fields, and an optional issued flag. Uses CommandExecutor.GetParameter to resolve inputs from the AI orchestrator. Related: EditRevisionCommand to modify an existing revision.
usecase: User wants to add a new revision to the project for issue tracking.
precondition: Active Revit document must be open and not read-only.
postcondition: A new Revision element exists in the document with the supplied metadata.

outputs.name: Revision
outputs.description: Created revision metadata including id, description, date, issuedBy, issuedTo, issued

preprompts: Creating a new revision in the document...
thinkingsteps: Setting description, date, and issue fields...
successprompts: Done — new revision added with description "{description}"
